title: Password Managers
drDigitalIntro: A password manager remembers all your passwords so you only have to remember one master password. It can also generate strong, unique passwords for every site automatically. Password managers are safe to use — they encrypt your passwords and store them securely. Popular options include Bitwarden (free), 1Password, and your browser's built-in password manager. Let's practice logging in with strong credentials!

steps.say: Go to the Login tab to practice signing in.

drDigitalSuccess: You practiced a secure login! A password manager would fill these in automatically for you.
drDigitalHint: Type in the username and password fields, then click Login.
